titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Jabir Ibn Yazid Al-ju'fi

text: ه عن جابر بن يزيد الجعفيّ‌ فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عمّه محمّد بن أبي القاسم، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن خالد البرقيّ عن أبيه، عن عمرو بن شمر، عن جابر بن يزيد الجعفيّ‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Jabir ibn Yazid Al-Ju'fi has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from his uncle Muhammad ibn Abi Al-Qasim, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khalid Al-Barqi, from his father, from Amr ibn Shimr, from Jabir ibn Yazid Al-Ju'fi.
